action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current inspector location, equipment status (calibration/battery), and ambient conditions.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_location
action_set_definitions.description: Relocates the inspector to a specific aircraft zone.

target_zone.description: The name of the zone to move to (e.g., 'Left Wheel Well').

action_set_definitions.name: list_components_in_zone
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all components and their unique IDs within the current zone, filtered by keyword if provided.

components.name: Hydraulic System A Case Drain Filter

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_component_status
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a visual inspection of a specific component to check indicators (e.g., pop-out pins, leaks).

component_id.description: The unique ID of the component to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_feda_lab_analysis
action_set_definitions.description: Performs Filter Element Debris Analysis (FEDA) using microscopic tools on the filter element associated with the given component ID.

component_id.description: The ID of the filter component to analyze.

action_set_definitions.name: query_metallic_logic_tree
action_set_definitions.description: Inputs microscopic findings to determine the disposition and the likely upstream failing component based on the metallic decision logic.

debris_data.description: The output data from the FEDA analysis.

action_set_definitions.name: file_maintenance_report
action_set_definitions.description: Submit the final disposition and findings to the aircraft maintenance log against the specific component ID.

component_id.description: The ID of the component against which the report is filed.

findings_summary.description: Summary of microscopic findings and upstream failure source.

state_description.inspector_location: The current physical zone where the inspector is located (e.g., 'Cockpit', 'Left Wing', 'Aft Fuselage').
state_description.component_conditions: A map of component IDs to their current physical status, including hidden defects, wear levels, and structural integrity.
state_description.inspection_log: A list of findings and measurements already recorded by the agent during the current session.
state_description.equipment_status: The status of available inspection tools (e.g., battery levels, calibration status, or connectivity).
state_description.environment_conditions: External factors affecting inspection, such as ambient lighting or temperature.

FLTR-CD-SYS-A-101.internal_debris: Significant yellow metallic flakes and magnetic slivers

inspection_log.result: O-ring replaced due to minor weepage
